name: hero-section-v6
title: Hero Section V6
description: A split layout SaaS hero section with heading, description, CTA button on the left, and animated image carousel on the right
docs: The carousel cycles through 4 images: voice-api.webp, imagine-api.webp, super-fast-api.webp, and fast-api.webp. Edit the carouselImages array in hero-section-v6.tsx to add your own images.
